name: Feynman Mode progress chart renders inside a styled panel with score label
description: After restyling the Feynman progress sparkline, the chart should render inside a bordered inset panel with a 'PROGRESS' header and a clearly visible latest score number on the right side. If the selected topic has no prior Feynman sessions, an empty-state message or absence of the panel is also acceptable — the test verifies that the page does not crash or show unstyled content either way.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Select any available topic from the topic selector dropdown

Verify one of two valid states: EITHER a progress section is visible below the topic selector showing a 'PROGRESS' label and a numeric score value inside a bordered panel (when prior sessions exist for this topic), OR the page renders cleanly without the progress panel and without any error or unstyled content (when no prior sessions exist). Either outcome is valid; a crash, 404, or broken layout is not.
